creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
On Mon, Nov 9, 2009 at 3:38 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/140413

Slony1 1.2.17 has a fatal bug when upgrading an existing configuration
from an earlier release.  It works fine for new releases, though.

I was waiting for 1.2.18 so people don't end up with broken
replication configurations when they attempt to upgrade.
